subject: [PATCH v5 05/21] nfsd: update the fsnotify mark when setting or removing a dir delegation

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch updates the fsnotify mark when setting or removing a directory delegation in NFSd. It introduces a new helper function, `nfsd_fsnotify_recalc_mask`, which recalculates the mask on the nfsd_file's fsnotify_mark based on the current directory delegations on an inode. The function is called when adding or removing directory delegations to ensure that notifications are properly set up for ignored delegation events. This patch addresses a potential issue where the fsnotify mark was not being updated correctly, leading to incorrect notification behavior.
